CustomField.description: Summary of DML work item execution status with success/failure counts.
CustomField.formula: IF(TotalRecordsPlanned__c = 0, "", IF(TotalRecordsPlanned__c = TotalRecordsProcessed__c && TotalRecordsSuccess__c = TotalRecordsProcessed__c, "✅ " & TEXT(TotalRecordsSuccess__c) & " success(es)", IF(TotalRecordsProcessed__c > 0 && TotalRecordsSuccess__c = 0, "❌ " & TEXT(TotalRecordsProcessed__c) & " failed", IF(TotalRecordsProcessed__c = 0, "⏸️ " & TEXT(TotalRecordsPlanned__c) & " planned, not executed", "⚠️ " & TEXT(TotalRecordsSuccess__c) & "/" & TEXT(TotalRecordsPlanned__c) & " success(es)" & IF(TotalRecordsProcessed__c - TotalRecordsSuccess__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalRecordsProcessed__c - TotalRecordsSuccess__c) & " failed" & IF(TotalRecordsPlanned__c - TotalRecordsProcessed__c > 0, ", " & TEXT(TotalRecordsPlanned__c - TotalRecordsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", ")" ), IF(TotalRecordsPlanned__c - TotalRecordsProcessed__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalRecordsPlanned__c - TotalRecordsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", "" ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Summary of DML work item execution status.
CustomField.label: DML Summary
